Name: HIT_GROUP_PARAM
Description: Defines hit group settings including brightness presets, enemy generation limits, and ground material slot mappings.

Fields.Name: Brightness Setting Slot 0
Fields.Description: Brightness configuration assigned to slot 0.

Fields.Name: Brightness Setting Slot 1
Fields.Description: Brightness configuration assigned to slot 1.

Fields.Name: Maximum Enemy Spawn Count
Fields.Description: Maximum number of enemies that can be generated simultaneously.
